Operation 'getPointDailyData' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks detail about what data fields are returned, date range capabilities, and the interpolation method used. Summary is vague about the geographic coordinate requirement. Enhanced version clarifies input parameters (lat/lon), output data types, and the interpolation approach for better AI agent understanding of when to use this endpoint versus station-based endpoints.

data.current_description: Returns daily weather data for a geographic location specified by latitude and longitude.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve daily weather data for geographic coordinates
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves daily weather observations for an arbitrary geographic location specified by latitude and longitude coordinates. Supports date range filtering and returns aggregated daily weather metrics including temperature, precipitation, wind speed, and other meteorological parameters. Data is interpolated from nearby weather stations.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks detail about what data fields are returned, date range capabilities, and the interpolation method used. Summary is vague about the geographic coordinate requirement. Enhanced version clarifies input parameters (lat/lon), output data types, and the interpolation approach for better AI agent understanding of when to use this endpoint versus station-based endpoints.

message: Operation 'getPointMonthlyData' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is incomplete regarding output data fields and date range capabilities. Summary lacks specificity about monthly aggregation. Enhanced version clarifies that data is aggregated monthly, specifies example output metrics, and explains the interpolation methodology for improved AI agent interpretability when choosing between daily, monthly, or normals endpoints.

data.current_description: Returns monthly aggregated weather data for a geographic location specified by latitude and longitude.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve monthly aggregated weather data for coordinates
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves monthly aggregated weather data for an arbitrary geographic location specified by latitude and longitude coordinates. Supports date range filtering and returns monthly summaries including average temperature, total precipitation, average wind speed, and other climate metrics. Data is interpolated from nearby weather stations.
data.reasoning: Original description is incomplete regarding output data fields and date range capabilities. Summary lacks specificity about monthly aggregation. Enhanced version clarifies that data is aggregated monthly, specifies example output metrics, and explains the interpolation methodology for improved AI agent interpretability when choosing between daily, monthly, or normals endpoints.

message: Operation 'getPointNormals' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks clarity about what 'climate normals' means and how they differ from daily/monthly observations. Missing details about output structure and the interpolation approach. Enhanced version defines climate normals, clarifies they represent long-term averages, specifies example metrics, and explains the distinction from observational data to help AI agents understand when to use this endpoint versus observation-based endpoints.

data.current_summary: Get climate normals for a location
data.current_description: Returns climate normals for a geographic location specified by latitude and longitude.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve climate normals for geographic coordinates
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves climate normals (long-term average weather statistics) for an arbitrary geographic location specified by latitude and longitude coordinates. Returns monthly normal values including average temperature, precipitation, and wind speed based on historical climate data. Normals represent climatological averages rather than current or recent observations. Data is interpolated from nearby weather stations.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity about what 'climate normals' means and how they differ from daily/monthly observations. Missing details about output structure and the interpolation approach. Enhanced version defines climate normals, clarifies they represent long-term averages, specifies example metrics, and explains the distinction from observational data to help AI agents understand when to use this endpoint versus observation-based endpoints.

message: Operation 'getStationHourlyData' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks clarity on acceptable station identifier formats and what specific meteorological variables are included in the response. Added details about identifier types and example output fields to improve AI agent interpretability when deciding whether to use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns hourly weather observations and model data for a specified station and date range.
data.description_suggestion: Returns hourly weather observations and model data for a specified station and date range. Accepts station identifier (Meteostat ID, WMO, or ICAO code), start/end dates, and optional parameters for data filtering. Returns an array of hourly weather records with temperature, precipitation, wind, and other meteorological variables.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on acceptable station identifier formats and what specific meteorological variables are included in the response. Added details about identifier types and example output fields to improve AI agent interpretability when deciding whether to use this operation.

Added clarity on acceptable station identifiers, reference period usage, and example output variables (monthly normals) to help AI agents determine when to use this operation for climate baseline data.

data.current_summary: Get climate normals for a station
data.current_description: Returns climate normals for a specified station and optional reference period.
data.description_suggestion: Returns climate normals for a specified station and optional reference period. Accepts station identifier (Meteostat ID, WMO, or ICAO code) and optional reference period parameters.
